codeReview.summary: The startup-path revision bump in src/app.ts closes the originally reported stale-cache gap for the bootstrap-only onReady flow, and the new app-level regression exercises that path successfully. However, the fix also clears syncFailureReason after a successful bootstrap without resetting allowStaleLiveService, which leaves runtime state contradictory and can misreport the hot endpoint source class after recovery from residual-stale startup.

issues.description: After a successful bootstrap-only initial sync, the code clears syncFailureReason but never resets allowStaleLiveService to false. If startup previously exposed residual stale data (or the state was otherwise marked stale-visible), hot endpoints will now serve fresh data while runtime state still advertises stale-live fallback as enabled, leaving freshness/source-class state inconsistent with actual endpoint behavior and making later transitions depend on stale flags that should have been cleared. The background-runtime path in src/services/market-runtime.ts explicitly clears allowStaleLiveService on successful sync, so the no-runtime path is now behaviorally divergent.

The new regression proves hotDataRevision increments from the all-false startup state, but it does not cover recovery from a bootstrap path where residual stale service was already visible or syncFailureReason was set. That missing characterization is what allowed the stale allowStaleLiveService flag divergence in src/app.ts to slip through.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission library documents that any runtime-state transition changing hot-endpoint freshness/visibility must advance hotDataRevision, but it does not also record that successful recovery transitions must clear stale/failure flags consistently across both background-runtime and bootstrap-only startup paths.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/runtime.md notes the shared revision rule, while src/services/market-runtime.ts resets both syncFailureReason and allowStaleLiveService on successful sync; src/app.ts for the bootstrap-only path only resets syncFailureReason.

summary: Fail: the revision bump fixes the original bootstrap cache invalidation bug, but the bootstrap-only success path still leaves allowStaleLiveService uncleared, creating inconsistent runtime state versus the already-correct background-runtime path.
